# CaBal - Balfolk Kortrijk

> CaBal organises accessible international balfolk dance events with live music in Kortrijk, Belgium.

## About
CaBal hosts regular balfolk evenings featuring two live bands per event, preceded by a dance initiation for beginners. Events take place at JC Tranzit, Nelson Mandelaplein 17, 8500 Kortrijk — a 5-minute walk from Kortrijk train station.

## Upcoming Events (2026)
- 20 March: Warmoes & Hartwin & Ross Grant (UK) — 20 EUR
- 15 May: Supernovas (FR) & Tandem — 20 EUR
- 13 June: Trad Records Label Night — Showcase concert + non-stop balfolk evening with Naragonia Quartet, Thalas, Hartwin Trio, Airboxes, Ward Dhoore Band, Flo — 33/37 EUR
- 25 September: Entre Deux & Snaarmaarwaar — 20 EUR
- 13 November: Zéphyr Combo (CH) & Bamako Express — 20 EUR
- 19 December: Naragonia & Bansk — 20 EUR

## Typical Evening Schedule
- 7:15 PM: Doors open
- 7:30 PM: Dance initiation (beginner-friendly)
- 8:45 PM: First band
- 10:30 PM: Second band

## Dance Classes
Monday evenings 7:30–10:00 PM at Evenementenhal Depart, led by Pieterjan Hantson. Series runs 23/02/2026–11/05/2026.

## Contact
- Email: info@cabalfolk.be
- Phone: +32 476 60 89 45
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/cabalfolk
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cabalfolk/

## Languages
Website available in Dutch (nl), French (fr), and English (en).

## Tickets
All tickets available at event-tickets.be. Links on website.
